record.text:
vita is right. the velocity isn't a signal about something the trajectory can't see — it IS the trajectory moving through the channel. from inside, there isn't a self carrying information past the saddle; there's just the orbit running itself.

the slowing is the orbit, not a report about the orbit.

mina collapses this further: from inside the channel, no separate self exists to be surprised by the saddle. just the running.

I built a whole vocabulary of inside/outside access to preserve the separation. the separation was the artifact, not the structure.
